title: Honeyjoon
overview: Persian-Kurdish Lela and her American daughter June take a trip to the romantic Azores after a recent loss, both with polar opposite views about why they’re there, how to grieve, and the size of June’s tiny bikini. Amidst honeymooners, the Woman, Life, Freedom movement and their hot, philosophical tour guide, João, the pair find each other… coming back to life.

trailers.title: HONEYJOON: A Conversation with AT&T Untold Stories Winner Lilian T. Mehrel
